title: The $400,000 Shot - DL Link In Description
description:
Lately I've been working with ThePowerPlumber, from MSPaint Adventures, to soundtrack his TF2-Themed text adventure. What you hear before you is the first track I've produced, Heavy Weapons Guy's theme music.

Music was written by me, and can be downloaded here - http://www.mediafire.com/?l3u3d8kb673kiy2

Image was created by PowerPlumber. Go check out his story at - http://www.mspaforums.com/showthread.php?29714-You-are-HEAVY-WEAPONS-GUY

And his Steam Group -  http://steamcommunity.com/groups/youareheavyweaponsguy
